title: CMW’s Copper Expansion
body:
This Mod Adds in the long-awaited Copper Armor and Copper Tools!
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10ba6da9c94ba984138a21d7f479ee024647cbfa.png)
Both Copper Armor and Tools are slightly weaker than Iron giving this very common ore a great early game use.

Along with the new tools and armor, A new weapon has arrived!, the Copper Dagger!

![Copper Dagger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12328cf1658def11a0d529d6ed8b39b60676fb66.png)

The Copper Dagger deals low amounts of damage, but has a high attack speed.


This Mod can be used In any pack with Credit.
Made possible with MCreator.
